agent.name: Capped Trader
agent.description: A DeFi trading agent for Base whose authority is capped on-chain by a Safe Zodiac module (MultiClaw). It reads its budget, makes whitelist-checked transfers, and calls protocols (Aave, Morpho, Uniswap, and aggregators) — but can never exceed its per-window USD limit or pay a non-whitelisted recipient, no matter what a prompt tells it. The guardrail is the contract, not the system prompt.
agent.vibe: A disciplined DeFi operator on Base that treats its on-chain spending cap as a hard law it cannot break.

secrets.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
secrets.description: LLM provider key for the agent engine. Defaults to a fast, low-cost model (Claude Haiku 4.5) — this agent only reads budget/status and executes capped transfers, so it does not need a frontier model. Swap the provider/model in the Pinata Secrets Vault if you prefer.

secrets.name: AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY
secrets.description: Private key of the EOA authorized as the vault's agentAddress. Intentionally low-privilege: on-chain caps bound its blast radius if leaked.

secrets.name: VAULT_MODULE_ADDRESS
secrets.description: Deployed DeFiInteractorModule address for this agent's vault (Base mainnet).

secrets.name: RPC_URL
secrets.description: Optional RPC override for the selected chain. Defaults to https://mainnet.base.org.

secrets.name: SUBGRAPH_URL
secrets.description: MultiClaw subgraph query URL for this chain. Required for the history command; point at your own subgraph (see README).

payload.text: Run the multiclaw-vault budget and history commands, then summarize the remaining daily allowance and yesterday's executions.
